If you didn't spend any limited pulls you got pretty lucky getting thais off standard. For the limited banners currently running saya and clementine are both very strong supports. Out of your roster, saya would work pretty well with caecus or sanga if you are trying to build them. 

Clem is great for buliding strength and keyflare. She works pretty well with ghelot if you were planning to pull her, though helot is also a strong 4th character on that team (ghelot/thais/aigis/flex).

I would recommend any standard realm that isn't chaos.

The upcoming banners also have two decent dps characters ghelot and pollux. I would recommend trying out both of them first though, they have rather unique playstyles. Both are kind of an aquired taste. Also pollux wants a lot of dupes.
